LanguageData.WULA_DamagePsychicScaling.label: Psychic amplification
LanguageData.WULA_DamagePsychicScaling.description: This weapon's damage scales with the wielder's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.WULA_ExtraPsychicSkill.label: Extra psychic ability
LanguageData.WULA_ExtraPsychicSkill.description: This weapon comes with an additional psychic ability.
LanguageData.WULA_Melee_Cleave.label: Cleave damage
LanguageData.WULA_Melee_Cleave.description: This weapon's melee attacks damage not only the target, but also others in a cone behind them.
LanguageData.WULA_MissileLauncher.label: Wula Empire missiles
LanguageData.WULA_MissileLauncher.description: This weapon's projectiles track enemies. If no clear target is available, they spread out before impact to form a bombardment zone.
LanguageData.WULA_PsychicIgnoreBlock.label: Ignore obstruction
LanguageData.WULA_PsychicIgnoreBlock.description: This weapon's attacks ignore all obstructions—mountains, walls, and shields alike.
